title: The World Just Keeps on Spinning
display_title: The World Just Keeps on Spinning
wikitext:
[]: The World Just Keeps on Spinning             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon May 14, 2007 7:14 pm y'know what would suck for the Angels if they caused 3I only to be dissapointed by finding out, theres no such thing they get to Adam (or Lilith or w/e) to do their thing, and it doesnt work and they went there for nothing they would probably go on a killing rampage and try to take down Human kind by themselves. But what if ONLY Lilith could cause 3I but (like said in another thread) had feelings for Shinji, and let him choose the fate of HumanKind? hm....thats somthing to think about
